title: An elevated perspective from ancient eagle’s nest

title: Relics of an ancient sandstorm on Mars point to Earth-like winds
description: Ancient ripple layers on Mars capture a single sandstorm, helping scientists estimate how dense the planet’s atmosphere once was.

title: Reviving Ancient Wisdom: Dattareya Hosabale's Call for Education Reform
description: Reviving Ancient Wisdom: Dattareya Hosabale's Call for Education Reform At the GSIF THRIVE-2026 summit, RSS general secretary Dattareya Hosabale called for educational reforms to integrate scientific inquiry with spirituality, aiming to reduce superstitions. He emphasized that educational curriculums should convey ancient scientific advancements to address societal inequalities. Hosabale highlighted that, unlike the historical conflict between religion and science in the West, Indian traditions see a harmonious relationship between spiritual practice and scientific inquiry. He stressed that this intellectual tradition is essential for civilizational growth and that education systems should reflect this interconnectedness. Governments, according to Hosabale, need to address prejudices and promote scientific advancements through education to ensure equitable economic growth and enhance the quality of life. He underscored the challenge of distinguishing genuine scientific inquiry from superstition and advocated for reviving the knowledge systems that incorporate past scientific inquiries.

title: A thirteen-year-old student discovered a rare ancient Greek coin in Berlin
description: On the obverse is depicted the head of the goddess Athena wearing a Corinthian helmet, while on the reverse Athena appears holding a spear in her right hand and a distaff in her left The post A thirteen-year-old student discovered a rare ancient Greek coin in Berlin appeared first on ProtoThema English .

title: Chinese proverb of the day: 'If you want one year of prosperity, grow grain. If you want 10 years of prosperity, grow...' – here's the ancient saying that smart leaders follow for sustainable growth and long-term success
description: Chinese proverb of the day: Proverbs emphasizes that true, lasting prosperity comes from investing in people, not just short-term gains. Growing grain offers quick rewards, while trees provide longer-term benefits. However, cultivating people through education and mentorship creates an impact that can last for generations, fostering innovation and sustained growth.
